Part.Source: Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &CollFilCod = RetornaFiliaisAutorizadas.UDP(&Context) If &Context.PesCod > 0 tbEmitidos.Visible = 0 EndIF retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWSALDO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('L', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') &IsComSaldo = IIF(SubStr(&PadObs,1,1) = '1',TRUE,FALSE) &IsOcultarTotais = IIF(SubStr(&PadObs,2,1) = '1',TRUE,FALSE) If &IsComSaldo = true BtnComsaldo.Caption = 'Sem Saldo' Else BtnComsaldo.Caption = 'Com Saldo' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DataBase.Visible = False &IsComSaldo.Visible = False &BanCarCod.Visible = False GridChequeProprio_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridChequeProprio.InternalName GridChequeProprio.Rows = 0 GridCheque_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridCheque.InternalName GridCheque.Rows = 0 Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = 0 &OutrosData = new() &OutrosDataItem = new() &OutrosDataItem.Title = 'Adiantar' &OutrosDataItem.EventKey = !'Adiantamento' &OutrosDataItem.IsDivider = False &OutrosData.Add(&OutrosDataItem) &OutrosDataItem = new() &OutrosDataItem.Title = 'Localizar' &OutrosDataItem.EventKey = !'Localizar' &OutrosDataItem.IsDivider = False &OutrosData.Add(&OutrosDataItem) &OutrosDataItem = new() &OutrosDataItem.Title = 'Conferência' &OutrosDataItem.EventKey = !'Conferencia' &OutrosDataItem.IsDivider = False &OutrosData.Add(&OutrosDataItem) &OutrosDataItem = new() &OutrosDataItem.Title = 'Conciliação Bancária' &OutrosDataItem.EventKey = !'ConciliarNEW' &OutrosDataItem.IsDivider = False &OutrosData.Add(&OutrosDataItem) &OutrosDataItem = new() &OutrosDataItem.Title = 'Transferências' &OutrosDataItem.EventKey = !'Transferencias' &OutrosDataItem.IsDivider = False &OutrosData.Add(&OutrosDataItem) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &IsOcultarTotais = true SectionFilters.Visible = 0 &OutrosDataItem = new() &OutrosDataItem.Title = 'Mostrar - Totais Superiores' &OutrosDataItem.EventKey = !'OcultarTotais' &OutrosDataItem.IsDivider = False &OutrosData.Add(&OutrosDataItem) Else SectionFilters.Visible = 1 &OutrosDataItem = new() &OutrosDataItem.Title = 'Ocultar - Totais Superiores' &OutrosDataItem.EventKey = !'OcultarTotais' &OutrosDataItem.IsDivider = False &OutrosData.Add(&OutrosDataItem) EndIf &DataBase = ServerDate() &AuxDataBase = &DataBase EndEvent Event Refresh txtExtratosdoDIa.Caption = format('DIA: %1', trim(toformattedString(&DataBase))) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CtaBanTip.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs hidden-sm' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridCartao.Load tbgridcartao.Height = 48 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &BanCarCodNom = Trim(str(BanCarCod))+' - '+Trim(BanCarNom) RetornaTotalSaldoCartao.call(EmpCod, &CollFilCod, &DataBase, BanCarCod, &CartaoSaldo, &CartaoFuturo) EndEvent Event GridChequeProprio.Load &VisuChePro.Visible = 1 prcTotalCheques.Call(&EmpCod, TipoCheque.Proprio, &DataBase, &CheProValor, &CheProValorFut) &CheProTitulo = 'EMITIDOS' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &VisuChePro = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ load &VisuChePro.Visible = 0 &CheProTitulo = 'DEVOLVIDOS' load EndEvent Event GridCheque.Load &TotChequeTerceiroHoje = 0 &TotChequeTerceiroFuturo = 0 &VisuCheRec.Visible = 1 prcTotalCheques.Call(&EmpCod, TipoCheque.Terceiro, &DataBase, &CheValor, &CheValorFut) &CheTitulo = 'RECEBIDOS - DE CLIENTES' &CheTitulo.TooltipText = 'Cheques RECEBIDOS Serão COMPENSADOS automaticamentes após 15 dias.' &VisuCheRec.TooltipText = 'Monitorar Cheques Recebidos' &TotChequeTerceiroHoje += &CheValor &TotChequeTerceiroFuturo += &CheValorFut /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &VisuCheRec = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ load EndEvent Event Grid.Load if &IsOcultarTotais = false &TotSdoEnt = 0 &TotSdoSai = 0 &TotSdoDia = 0 &TotSdoAtu = 0 SaldoTotaisMonitoraSaldo.Call(&EmpCod, &CollFilCod, &Context.PesCod,&DataBase,&TotSdoEnt,&TotSdoSai,&TotSdoDia,&TotSdoAtu) Endif For each Order EmpCod, CtaBanSts, CtaBanOrd, CtabanCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where CtaBanSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO &EmpCod = EmpCod &CtabanCod = CtabanCod if not CtaBanNomExib.IsEmpty() and not CtaBanNomExib.IsNull() &CtaBanBanCodNom = CtaBanNomExib Else &CtaBanBanCodNom = CtaBanCodNom Endif &CtaBanFilCod = CtaBanFilCod Do 'GetFilial' &CtaFecDta = CtaFecDta &ConSdoEnt = 0 &ConSdoSai = 0 &ConSdoFut = 0 If &Context.PesCod > 0 Do 'ValidaPermisaoConta' Else &IsAutorizado = True EndIf If &IsAutorizado = True SaldoAConferir.call(EmpCod,CtabanCod,&ConSdoEnt,&ConSdoSai) For each Order EmpCod,CtabanCod,(SdoDta) Where SdoDta <= &DataBase &SdoDta = SdoDta &SdoAnt = SdoAnt &SdoEnt = SdoEnt &SdoSai = SdoSai &SdoDia = SdoDia &SdoAtu = SdoAtu Exit When none &SdoDta = &DataBase &SdoAnt = 0 &SdoEnt = 0 &SdoSai = 0 &SdoDia = 0 &SdoAtu = 0 EndFor &SdoEnt.ForeColor = rgb(0,0,255) &SdoSai.ForeColor = rgb(255,0,0) &ConSdoFut = (&SdoAtu+&ConSdoEnt) - &ConSdoSai &SdoAtu.ColumnClass = IIF(&SdoAtu >= 0, !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo WWColumnInfoSingleCell',!'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell') Grid.HoveringColor = RGB(&hR, &hG, &hB) Grid.SelectionColor = RGB(&sR, &sG, &sB) Do Case Case CtaBanTip = TipoConta.BANCO &CtaBanTip = 'Banco' Case CtaBanTip = TipoConta.CAIXA &CtaBanTip = 'Caixa' Case CtaBanTip = TipoConta.CAIXAPDV &CtaBanTip = 'PDV' Case CtaBanTip = TipoConta.MOTORISTA &CtaBanTip = 'Motorista' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &Extrato = !'' &Transferencia = !'' &FechaAbreCaixa = !'' If (&CtaBanTip <> 'PDV' AND &CtaBanTip <> 'Motorista') &FechaAbreCaixa.Class = !'Attribute' Else &FechaAbreCaixa.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &CtaBanTip.ColumnClass = iif(&CtaBanTip = 'PDV', !'WWColumn hidden-xs hidden-sm WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn hidden-xs hidden-sm') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &ConSdoFut <> &SdoAtu &ConSdoFut.ForeColor = rgb(255,0,0) Else &ConSdoFut.ForeColor = rgb(0,0,0) EndIf If &IsComSaldo = True If &SdoAtu <> 0 Load EndIf Else Load EndIf EndIf EndFor &SdoDta = &DataBase &SdoAnt = 0 &SdoEnt = 0 &SdoSai = 0 &SdoDia = 0 &SdoAtu = 0 &ConSdoEnt = 0 &ConSdoFut = 0 &ConSdoSai = 0 EndEvent Event &Transferencia.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Transferencia_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Transferencia_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WWTransferencia.Create(&EmpCod, &CtaBanCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Transferencia_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPMovimento.Call(TrnMode.Insert, &EmpCod, 0, &CtaBanCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoRecebimento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wwDuplicataReceber.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoPagamentos' wwDuplicataPagar.link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoArqCobranca' WWGeraCobranca.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoComsaldo' If &IsComSaldo = True &IsComSaldo = False BtnComsaldo.Caption = 'Com Saldo' Else &IsComSaldo = True BtnComsaldo.Caption = 'Sem Saldo' EndIf do 'Padraousuario' refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAjuda' innewWindow.Target = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?7b7e1c34-7de0-46b6-9ff9-15ac820ad17c' inNewWindow.Name = '_blank' innewWindow.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter &DataBase = &AuxDataBase Refresh &AuxDataBase.SetFocus() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_Outros.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_Outros.ActiveEventKey = !'Adiantamento' Do 'Do Adiantamento' Case ddo_Outros.ActiveEventKey = !'Localizar' Do 'Do Localizar' Case ddo_Outros.ActiveEventKey = !'Conferencia' Do 'Do Conferencia' Case ddo_Outros.ActiveEventKey = !'ConciliarNEW' Do 'Do ConciliarNEW' Case ddo_Outros.ActiveEventKey = !'Transferencias' Do 'Do Transferencias' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_Outros.ActiveEventKey = !'OcultarTotais' Do 'USerDo OcultarTotais' EndCase EndEvent Sub 'Do Adiantamento' WPAdiantamento.link('WWSALDO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Localizar' WPLOcalizarMovimento.link(&EmpCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Conferencia' Wpconferencia.link(&EmpCod,&CtabanCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConciliarNEW' wpConciliacaoBancaria.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Transferencias' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ MonitoraTransferencias.PopUp() Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &Extrato.Click WWExtrato.Link(&EmpCod , &CtaBanCod) EndEvent Event &CtaBanBanCodNom.Click WWMovimento.Link(&CtaBanCod) EndEvent Event &FechaAbreCaixa.Click wpFechaAbreCaixa.Popup(&EmpCod, &CtabanCod) Refresh EndEvent Event &VisuCheRec.Click wwMonitoraCheques.Link() EndEvent Event &VisuChePro.Click wwMonitoraChequeProprios.Link() EndEvent Event tbCartao.Click WWduplicatasCartao.Link() EndEvent Sub 'USerDo OcultarTotais' if &IsOcultarTotais = false &IsOcultarTotais = true Else &IsOcultarTotais = false Endif do 'Padraousuario' wwSaldo.Link() EndSub Sub 'GetFilial' For each Order EmpCod,FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &CtaBanFilCod &CtaBanFilNom = iif(FilCodNom.Length() > 25, Substr(FilCodNom,1, 25) + '...', FilCodNom) Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'ValidaPermisaoConta' &IsAutorizado = False For each Order EmpCod, CtabanCod, CtaFunCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where CtabanCod = &CtaBanCod Where CtaFunCod = &Context.PesCod Where CtaFunIsCx <> Status_SimNao.Nao &IsAutorizado = True exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'Padraousuario' &PadObs = IIF(&IsComSaldo = true,'1','0') &PadObs += IIF(&IsOcultarTotais = true,'1','0') PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') EndSub //Event &AuxDataBase.IsValid // // if &DataBase <> &AuxDataBase // &DataBase = &AuxDataBase // Refresh // Endif // //EndEvent
